content:
# Review

## Outcome

**Approved**

## Evidence

- All 91 milestone_record tests pass (0 failures, 0 ignored)
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes cleanly (no warnings)
- cargo fmt --all --check passes (no formatting issues)
- Amendment fr-11-9348c590 FIXED: fs.rs:2449-2460 now emits tracing::warn! with bead_id, timestamp, existing_details, and requested_details before replacing malformed legacy completion details (starts_with 'project=' but unparseable). Operators can now audit when this lossy fallback fires.
- Amendment fr-11-3f2dfcd6 FIXED: find_matching_running_task_run (model.rs:437-442) now checks matching_running_entries.as_slice() as a whole — the pattern `[entry] if entry.run_id.is_none()` only matches when the runless entry is the SOLE open attempt. With mixed state [(run_id=None, Running), (run_id='run-2', Running)], the two-element slice falls to `_ => None`, and the caller at fs.rs:2837 rejects via the `matching_running_entries.len() > 1` ambiguity guard.
- Amendment fr-11-3f2dfcd6 model test verified: find_matching_running_task_run_rejects_mixed_legacy_and_named_open_attempts (model.rs:859-892) seeds (run_id=None, Running) + (run_id='run-2', Running) and asserts find_matching_running_task_run returns None for run_id='run-3'.
- Amendment fr-11-3f2dfcd6 integration test verified: start_rejects_mixed_legacy_and_named_open_attempts (service.rs:2794-2860) performs the same scenario end-to-end and asserts 'ambiguous' error.
- Amendment fr-11-84b6b1d6 FIXED in start path: backfill_running_entry (fs.rs:2693-2714) now pattern-matches on entry.plan_hash.as_deref() — when the existing hash differs from the requested hash, it returns Err with plan_hash_conflict_details instead of silently ignoring.
- Amendment fr-11-84b6b1d6 FIXED in completion path: update_task_run (fs.rs:3086-3102) non-terminal branch now pattern-matches entry.plan_hash.as_deref() — conflicting plan_hash returns AppError::CorruptRecord with plan_hash_conflict_details instead of silently preserving the stale value.
- Amendment fr-11-84b6b1d6 FIXED in terminal replay path: incompatible_terminal_update check (fs.rs:3058-3064) includes Self::option_conflicts(entry.plan_hash.as_deref(), plan_hash) so terminal replays with conflicting plan_hash are also rejected.
- Amendment fr-11-84b6b1d6 start test verified: start_retry_rejects_conflicting_plan_hash (service.rs:2730-2791) starts with plan-v1, retries with plan-v2, asserts 'conflicting plan_hash' error; lineage retains plan-v1 and remains Running.
- Amendment fr-11-84b6b1d6 completion test verified: completion_rejects_conflicting_plan_hash (service.rs:1716-1800) starts with plan-v1, completes with plan-v2, asserts 'conflicting plan_hash' error; snapshot remains Active with bead-1 active, lineage retains plan-v1 and remains Running.
- All prior acceptance criteria remain satisfied: milestone state answers 'what happened to bead X?', controller can update linkage after each run outcome, all new fields are optional for backward compatibility with existing NDJSON data

## Findings and Gaps

- All three final-review amendments (fr-11-9348c590, fr-11-3f2dfcd6, fr-11-84b6b1d6) have been addressed with code changes and regression tests in completion round 12.
- AppError::RunStartFailed is still used (service.rs ~line 555 and backfill_running_entry at fs.rs:2696) for rejecting non-terminal outcomes and plan_hash conflicts in update_task_run and start paths. A more specific error variant would be semantically cleaner but this is cosmetic, not a correctness issue — carried forward from prior reviews.
- The outstanding risk — milestone mutations span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction — remains. All paths are serialized by the milestone mutation lock and replay-safe, making this an acceptable trade-off for file-based storage.
- The matching_running_task_runs helper (fs.rs:2608-2621) used in record_task_run_start to check for ambiguous open attempts performs a full scan of all entries. For typical milestone sizes this is negligible, but worth noting.

## Follow-up and Amendments

None.
